title: psychotria goniocarpa
intro: Psychotria goniocarpa is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the rubiaceae family, which includes the coffee and gardenia plants. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Psychotria goniocarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
